name: SPARBench-style subset (stub, 5 queries)
source_note: SPARBench (Specialized PAper Retrieval Benchmark, arXiv:2507.15245) is a 2024 benchmark for academic paper retrieval. The OFFICIAL dataset (200+ queries with expert-validated gold standards) must be downloaded separately from https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.15245 supplementary material or the authors' release repo. Replace this file's `queries` array with the official `sparbench_v1.json` when available. The 5 stubs below are placeholder examples in SPARBench style (specialized domain queries with citation-graph gold standards).
license_note: TBD pending official release. The placeholders below are original and freely usable for testing.

expected_field_format.gold_papers: list of DOI strings; expert-curated, typically 8-20 papers per query
expected_field_format.difficulty: easy | medium | hard — SPARBench classifies by topic specificity

queries.query: How do single-cell RNA-seq integration methods handle batch effects across heterogeneous tissue types in spatial transcriptomics?
What are the experimental signatures of axion dark matter haloscopes in the microwave cavity frequency range?
How do enzyme-mediated chemoselective C-H activation reactions in natural product biosynthesis differ from synthetic catalysis?
What evidence supports the role of mitochondrial dynamics in age-related neurodegeneration onset in Drosophila models?
How do graph neural networks for materials property prediction handle long-range periodicity in crystal structures?

todo_for_user: Replace this stub with the official SPARBench v1 dataset when fetched from https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.15245. The benchmark runner (scripts/run_benchmark.py) accepts this same schema so no code change is needed — just swap the queries array.
